boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?

final_answer: The clinical batch may be released. Deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 precisely aligns with batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and release date 2026-06-28 as required by policy STD-XOR-078-P.
